page.introText: This is my ongoing personal project to archive Islamic information, knowledge, history, language, and heritage in one calm, organized space. I am building it as a living collection that can grow over time through notes, timelines, reflections, and carefully structured resources.

cards.title: The Bookshelf
cards.description: A growing archive of the Qur'an, Hadith collections, Tafsir, Sirah, classical and contemporary Islamic books.

cards.title: Lives of the Prophets
cards.description: The journeys of the prophets from Adam to Muhammad, together with the righteous individuals who shaped the story of revelation before the completion of Islam.

cards.title: Legacies of the Ummah
cards.description: The stories of the Companions, scholars, rulers, commanders, travelers, and reformers whose lives carried Islam across generations.

cards.title: The Garden of Remembrance
cards.description: A continually expanding collection of duas, adhkar, daily supplications, and prophetic invocations for reflection, worship, and spiritual grounding.

cards.title: Exploring Aqeedah
cards.description: A detailed exploration of Aqeedah, including Allah's oneness, the angels, the jinn, revelation, the Last Day, Paradise, Hell, and divine decree.

cards.title: Lands of Islam
cards.description: A map-themed journey through the regions, cities, civilizations, and routes that shaped Islamic history, from the Hejaz and Al-Andalus to the Maghreb and beyond.
